notifications.title: Set a Favourite Country
notifications.message: Open By Country in the sidebar and tap the star next to any country to make it your default. RadioAjay will load that country's stations every time you open the app.

notifications.title: RadioAjay Updated
notifications.message: New in this release: automatic CarPlay & Android Auto detection, vibrant new logo, improved mobile layout with full-height country/genre lists, always-visible favourite heart, and more.
